files.content:
# phytron.db
# EPICS database scaffold for Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH.
#
# Required macros:
#   P      = record prefix
#   PORT   = asyn IP port name
#   ADDR   = MCC-1 address character to embed in StreamDevice frames
#
# IMPORTANT:
# - ADDR must be verified during commissioning.
# - Observed working case used address 0.
# - Previous non-working case used address 1.
# - If communication fails, test ADDR first before changing command bytes.

record(ai, "$(P)POS_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "MCC-1 position readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getPosition($(ADDR)) $(PORT)")
    field(SCAN, "1 second")
    field(PREC, "0")
}

record(bo, "$(P)MOVE_PLUS") {
    field(DESC, "MCC-1 move plus")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto movePlus($(ADDR)) $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Move+")
}

record(bo, "$(P)MOVE_MINUS") {
    field(DESC, "MCC-1 move minus")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto moveMinus($(ADDR)) $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Move-")
}

record(bo, "$(P)STOP") {
    field(DESC, "MCC-1 stop motion")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto stopMotion($(ADDR)) $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Stop")
}

record(ai, "$(P)SPEED_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "MCC-1 speed readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getSpeed($(ADDR)) $(PORT)")
    field(SCAN, "2 second")
    field(PREC, "0")
}

#!../../bin/linux-x86_64/phytronIOC
# st.cmd
# IOC startup script for Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH using StreamDevice over TCP/IP.
#
# Bring-up notes:
# - TCP port is fixed to 22222 per task/context.
# - Address handling must be checked during commissioning.
# - Observed working controller address was 0.
# - Enable asyn trace below to compare sent/received framed bytes with Wireshark.
# - Verified framing bytes: STX=0x02, ETX=0x03.
# - Exact payload bytes for all commands are not fully verified; see phytron.proto comments.

< envPaths

cd "${TOP}"

dbLoadDatabase "dbd/phytronIOC.dbd"
phytronIOC_registerRecordDeviceDriver pdbbase

# Configure TCP/IP connection to MCC-1.
# Replace 192.168.0.10 with the actual controller IP during deployment.
# Port 22222 is required by task/context.
echo "Configuring MCC-1 TCP connection on port 22222"
drvAsynIPPortConfigure("MCC1","192.168.0.10:22222",0,0,0)

# Optional asyn tuning / debugging.
# Keep enabled during commissioning so frame bytes can be inspected.
asynSetTraceMask("MCC1",0,0x9)
asynSetTraceIOMask("MCC1",0,0x2)

# Load StreamDevice records.
# P    = PV prefix
# PORT = asyn port configured above
# ADDR = MCC-1 address character inserted into frame payloads
#        Observed working value: 0
#        Previous failing value: 1
#        Verify this first if there is no response.
dbLoadRecords("db/phytron.db","P=PHYTRON:,PORT=MCC1,ADDR=0")

cd "${TOP}/iocBoot/${IOC}"
iocInit
